title: IOS5 vs ICS
body: **Android, IOS, Windows Phone, BlackBerry, ... which mobile Operating System is better?** For me, the fundamental characteristic of an OS must be usability, in this sense Apple has made much progress, it has known how to focus on this aspect although sometimes leaving aside other issues (multitasking, customization, etc.) Apple and BB also do very well with promotion, most users choose one of these systems simply because they are unaware of Android's possibilities. Microsoft had lost the game and now with Windows Phone is fighting for its market share, but only with money cannot buy the lost time. Apple has always known how to redirect the best technological ideas, adapt them and sell them, it has not invented anything although it gives the impression that they and many media outlets want to give us. Tablets have existed for years, as well as touch devices and novel user interfaces, Apple has known how to unify them, make them more usable and sell them, and that is not insignificant. Google is very strong, it has many resources and has the internet as its focus, and that nowadays is essential. Android has managed to become a very powerful OS in a short time. We can say that mobile OSs are already mature, increasingly complete and more powerful (much more powerful than many desktop computers we find in most offices). These new versions from Google (Android 4 Ice Cream Sandwich) and Apple (IOS5) I find very close in features. Clearly they have inspired each other for their updates, like notifications in IOS5 or usability in ICS. Personally I still like Android more, basically because it is an open, flexible and customizable OS. In IOS I miss the possibility of adding widgets to the screen and greater integration with the Cloud, and not only with its own. In short, it is a closed OS since it has a very large market which helps create this ghetto or community of Apple "fanatics". ;-) What do you think?
